items.prompt: solves bounded exponential and logarithmic equations and interprets inverse-function relationships across representations
items.expected_evidence: solve bounded exponential and logarithmic equations while preserving inverse-function meaning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner solves accurately while preserving the inverse relationship between exponential and logarithmic forms.

items.prompt: explains why logarithms invert exponentials and how that inverse structure appears in equations, graphs, and domain/range relationships
items.expected_evidence: explain inverse relationships between exponential and logarithmic forms in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains logarithmic behavior as inverse-function structure rather than as isolated notation.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to log_rule_without_domain_check.
items.expected_evidence: compare logarithmic and exponential graphs and identify reflected or inverse-linked structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies where a logarithmic manipulation ignored inverse structure or domain restrictions.

items.prompt: interprets a less-familiar logarithmic or inverse-function context and selects the representation that reveals the needed meaning
items.expected_evidence: interpret logarithmic quantities or scales with coherent algebraic and contextual meaning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves inverse-function meaning across representation and context.
